## Verification

## Checklist

- [ ] The scope is focused and within the approved project contract.
- [ ] Tests pass locally.
- [ ] Coverage remains at least 90% for product branches and 100% for changed product lines.
- [ ] Every commit has a valid DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`), including co-authors.
- [ ] `uv.lock` is updated when dependencies changed and passes `uv lock --check`.
- [ ] This PR does not include unauthorized CI or protected-configuration changes.
- [ ] Any public-contract change has an explicit maintainer decision.
